name: Deep-Dish Turkey Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine 2 cups of broth, celery, onions, and carrots. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. In a custard cup, stir remaining 1/4 cup broth and cornstarch until smooth. Slowly stir this into the broth-vegetable mixture.
4. Stir in milk. Cook and stir over medium heat until mixture comes to a boil. Reduce heat. Cook and stir for 1 minute more.
5. Stir in turkey, peas, parsley, and sage. Transfer mixture to a shallow 2-quart casserole.
6. Lay one sheet of phyllo dough on top of the turkey mixture. Spray with non-stick spray. Repeat layering and spraying two more times. Fold or crumple edges and tuck inside the casserole dish.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown. (Optional: add potatoes, mixed vegetables, tabasco sauce, and liquid smoke to enhance flavor.)
